description: Running CMake inside the source tree scatters generated files among sources, shadowing clean configures and risking accidental commits.
body: Failure mode: cmake is invoked in the source directory, writing CMakeCache.txt, Makefiles, and object files alongside tracked sources. Detection signals: git status shows many generated files; a later out-of-source configure reads a stale in-source cache; the source tree will not configure cleanly elsewhere. Do not configure in the source directory. Safer fallback: always build out-of-source with cmake -S . -B build, gitignore the build dir, and delete any stray in-source artifacts before reconfiguring.
